name: Trident Memory System
description: Three-tier persistent memory architecture for OpenClaw agents. Provides daily episodic logs, curated long-term memory, semantic recall via LCM, and WAL-based continuity without vendor lock-in.
author: Shiva

memoryRoot.description: Root directory for memory files (default: workspace root)

maxDailyLogSize.description: Maximum size of daily log before rotation (bytes, default: 5MB)

enableSemanticRecall.description: Enable semantic recall via Qdrant (requires setup)

tools.name: memory_search
tools.description: Search Trident memory using full-text or regex

tools.name: memory_update
tools.description: Append entries to daily memory log
